items.title: Re-prove Spark A/B/C endpoint health after planned rack maintenance
items.evidence: model-runtime-check --check-endpoints returned high=13 at 1500ms and 5000ms; curl to Spark A/B /v1/models timed out. Tom confirmed all DGX/Spark devices are powered down for rack installation.
items.recommended_action: Do not change routing because of this downtime. After hardware maintenance ends, run read-only endpoint health checks and record fresh runtime history.

items.title: Add runtime history freshness and planned-maintenance semantics
items.evidence: history-json reported RUNTIME_DEGRADED from older records while live endpoint check was unavailable during planned DGX/Spark maintenance.
items.recommended_action: Add freshness thresholds and surface STALE or PLANNED_MAINTENANCE_RECHECK_REQUIRED in CLI, Doctor, Dossier, and UI.

items.title: Normalize Codex Worker dispatcher integration config status
items.evidence: codex_worker_enabled=true and allow_dispatcher_integration=true, but dispatcher_integration is still the string deferred.
items.recommended_action: Done: config now uses status=controlled_enabled and config validation rejects contradictory boolean/status combinations.

items.title: Clarify or implement senior-reviewer Codex Worker dispatch policy
items.evidence: senior-reviewer-agent routes to Codex/GPT-5.5, but Codex Worker allowlist currently includes senior-coding-agent only.
items.recommended_action: Done: senior-reviewer-agent is separately allowlisted for controlled Codex Worker dispatch with metadata, scope, product-gate, and sensitive-work tests.

items.title: Add Governance UI browser smoke and visual regression coverage
items.evidence: Governance UI browser smoke now visits every /governance route, verifies shell/content, rejects generic Next.js error pages, and captures ignored screenshots under tmp/governance-ui-browser-smoke/.
items.recommended_action: Keep cmd.exe /c pnpm governance:ui:smoke in the governance UI validation path.

items.title: Deepen project profile portability with second-project fixture
items.evidence: Project Profiles V2 adds an inactive fixture-beauty-club profile, schema validation for LumeOS and fixture profiles, selected-profile snapshot loading, path traversal rejection, and non-Nutrition source-chain fixture coverage.
items.recommended_action: Keep future project activation gated on Tom-provided repo path and policy; next profile work is a full generic source-chain policy engine if needed.

items.title: Add deterministic decomposition-plan validator
items.evidence: A profile-aware decomposition-plan validator now checks plan identity, project/profile id, objective, source_refs, constraints, non_goals, subtask scope, expected outputs, acceptance criteria, forbidden paths, runtime artifacts, raw data outputs, DB/Supabase/migration risk, approval-grant tasks, and closed product gate behavior before WO generation.
items.recommended_action: Run decomposition-plan-validator.ts --plan <plan-file> --project <profile> --json before accepting structured decomposition plans; future work remains deterministic conversion from free-form ideas/specs into validated structured plans.

items.title: Add ignored runtime report retention and redaction policy
items.evidence: Report retention policy now classifies Codex Worker reports, runtime history, browser smoke artifacts, dossiers, learning drafts, and transient CLI outputs. A read-only summarizer reports metadata, sensitive flags, ignored/tracked policy status, and dry-run cleanup candidates without dumping prompt or transcript bodies.
items.recommended_action: Use report-retention-summarizer.ts --json for local artifact audits and keep generated Codex/runtime/browser-smoke artifacts ignored.

items.title: Add promotion governance health/status mode
items.evidence: promotion-governance --review-branch main returns NEEDS_FIX with git.branch_not_ahead when used as a health check.
items.recommended_action: Add --status or --review-current mode, or downgrade branch_not_ahead to info for main no-op review.

items.title: Add draft memory update proposal workflow
items.evidence: governance-learning-suggest now supports --memory-proposals for draft-only handover/canonical memory update proposals. It derives proposals from handover, TODO register, learning records, and optional source files; flags stale/conflicting memory notes; blocks unsafe product/DB/Supabase/migration/BLS/broad-Codex/fixture-activation suggestions; and writes only to memory-update-drafts with explicit --write-drafts.
items.recommended_action: Use governance-learning-suggest.ts --memory-proposals --json for read-only memory update review and --memory-proposals --write-drafts only when Tom wants reviewed draft proposals prepared.

items.title: Mark old Nutrition bootstrap docs as archival or active
items.evidence: Older docs and batches still contain Nutrition bootstrap run instructions and historical cleanup context.
items.recommended_action: Add archival labels or an active-runbook index so Tom can distinguish current operator flow from historical notes.
